base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_9_starbase — a tile (level_layout) from 1991 turtles in time. Starbase: Where No Turtle Has Gone Before — 2100 AD space station. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
